title: 001199 with one RealMLP seed n_ens32
summary: Increase n_ens only for one of the two RealMLP seeds inside 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep seed A at n_ens=20 and set seed B to n_ens=32, then average the two RealMLP seeds and apply the same CatBoost correction. Do not change weights or features.
expected_effect: Test a cheaper compromise between default two-seed and full n_ens32 for both seeds.
risk: Mixed ensemble sizes can add compute without a clear enough diversity gain.
